headline: Barrick Mining Stock Still Looks Undervalued At $44
summary: Barrick Mining Corp (NYSE: B) sits on 89 million ounces of proven and probable gold reserves. At gold prices near $4,700 an ounce, that's more than $400 billion worth of gold in the ground against a market cap of roughly $75 billion.

headline: Roundhill's New LOHA ETF Targets 'AI-Proof' Companies With Heavy Assets And Stable Cash Flows
summary: The Roundhill HALO ETF targets AI-resistant industrial, mining and infrastructure companies with heavy assets and durable cash flows.

raw.headline: Roundhill's New LOHA ETF Targets 'AI-Proof' Companies With Heavy Assets And Stable Cash Flows

headline: Is It Too Late To Consider Newmont (NEM) After A 148% One Year Rally?
summary: If you are wondering whether Newmont at US$118.96 is still offering value after a strong run, the key is to look past the headline price and into what different valuation methods are saying about the stock. Over the past year, Newmont has recorded a 147.6% return, with returns of 17.5% year to date, 3.4% over the last 7 days, and 2.1% over the last 30 days, which puts recent price action firmly on most investors' radar. Recent coverage of Newmont has focused on its position in the gold...
